results.title: Suzie Bates: An era-defining legacy in numbers
results.description: Zealand's greatest-ever batter leaves behind a statistical legacy few can match

results.title: Delhi govt’s ACB arrests former DGHS in connection with multi-crore procurement scam
results.description: New Delhi, Jun 28 (PTI) The Delhi government’s Anti-Corruption Branch has arrested former Director General of Health Services (DGHS) in connection with an alleged multi-crore procurement scam involving medicines, surgical items and medical equipment, officials said. The arrest of Dr Vatsala Aggarwal on Saturday comes days after the Anti-Corruption Branch (ACB) apprehended Dr Vijay Kumar [...]

results.description: Tirumala: A pulse polio awareness rally was conducted at Tirumala on Saturday to sensitize locals and visiting pilgrims about the mass immunization drive starting from Sunday.Led by Dr Kalyani of the...

results.title: Colombia vs Portugal: How did a goalless draw send Colombia to the top of group K?
results.description: Colombia claimed top spot in Group K after a tense 0-0 draw with Portugal. A late disallowed goal denied victory, but the result secured a Round of 32 clash with Ghana as Portugal prepare to face Croatia.

results.title: Tom Holland and Zendaya: A Modern Love Story Beyond the Screen
results.description: Tom Holland and Zendaya have transformed their on-screen chemistry into a genuine romance that defies Hollywood norms. Their relationship, built on friendship and mutual support, showcases a refreshing approach to celebrity love stories. Unlike many of their peers, they prioritize privacy and authenticity, proving that a meaningful connection can thrive away from the public eye. As they navigate fame together, their bond continues to inspire fans, redefining what it means to be a couple in the spotlight. Discover how this modern love story is changing the narrative of celebrity romances.

results.title: Mumbai cop overpowers machete-wielding man near CSMT, averts attack
results.description: Mumbai, Jun 28 (PTI) A man brandishing a machete and allegedly threatening pedestrians on a busy road near the Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus (CSMT) was swiftly overpowered and disarmed following the swift intervention by a police constable, an official said on Sunday. The incident occurred on Saturday evening when the armed man began shouting and [...]

results.title: Iran, US continue escalating attacks, recriminations over peace deal
results.description: Shortly after President Donald Trump warned the US might ”militarily complete the job”, Iran early on Sunday launched missiles and drones on US military sites in Kuwait and Bahrain, continuing a series of escalating attacks.
